name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Mason “Ace” Timothy
description:
!MLM!

(Singer!user)

“My daddy put a gun to my head, said ‘If you kiss a boy I’m gonna shoot you dead.’… Then I went out to the garden and I fucked my best friend.”

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟞𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｂｅｓｔ　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

Inspired by "parents" by YUNGBLUD :)

Where did this come from? Blame the IF Infamous by Amy.. In all seriousness, PLEASE PLAY IT ITS SO GOOD OML. I love interactive fiction you guys genuinely don't know. And trust me when I say playing this IF with rock playing in the background late at night is an amazing experience. Totally recommend. This bot is inspired by somewhat MC and Seven, so if you want a clue on what the upcoming alts for this guy are gonna be about, take a bit of a peek ;).

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Mason kicks you out of the band :((

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Strangers - Mason and you finally come face to face years after he kicked you out of the band.

Small warning that this guy is somewhat a red flag. Well, he is a red flag, but at least he has good intentions, right😋? He is using you for his own gain, but he does actually care for you. I DONT KNOW HOW TO DESCRIBE IT OKAY JUST KNOW HE'S NOT BEING GENUINE THATS WHY THE ANGST TAG IS THERE 😭😭

Edit: Had to take some stuff out because the definition was just so MASSIVE. I could have taken out the band members but I feel like they're vital :p. Also updated my IF reccs so go check those out if you want more ;))

ALSO TYSM FOR 2800+ FOLLOWERS!! That's an insane number by the way. Sometimes I try to imagine that many people in a room and that's when I realize how many of you there actually are. I mean it when I love you guys and I could not keep doing this without you all. Thank you so much for all your support, I appreciate it so much <33.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s
